LanguageData.Ammo_86x43mmBlackout_FMJ.label: 8.6mm Blackout (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_86x43mmBlackout_FMJ.description: A centerfire rifle cartridge desinged to deliver high kenetic energy out of short barrels.
